title.en: Trillions and trillions of solstice years have ...

content.en:
It was getting closer and closer to the arrival of the extradimensional storm, and Ye Tian had been cultivating penance.

With the extra-dimensional resources that suited him last time he bought on the Galanbo ship, his Eternal Dao Seed refining effect was very good, but if he wanted to refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the extreme and condense the twelfth Eternal Realm Spirit before the extradimensional storm came, it was obviously too late.

But.

He relied on the extra-dimensional thing of the Jialan Stone Plate, and constantly deduced the extra-dimensional techniques, and finally perfected all kinds of extra-dimensional techniques, and the effect increased by at least more than thirty percent, which was equivalent to increasing his own strength.

Trillions and trillions of solstice years have passed.

this day.

A breeze gradually blew in the Void of Death, and this breeze seemed to be powerless, but it was not normal.

There was no such thing as wind in the Void of Death, and now there was a light breeze, which was enough to represent that it was one of the signs of an extradimensional storm coming.

"At most, after three trillion years of the Dao Era, the extradimensional storm will come!"

This is the result of Ye Tian's use of the Jialan Stone Plate to deduce the performance.

At this time, the extradimensional void of the 7,362nd realm was already unstable, and those formations that crossed the boundary superdimensional barrier could not be crossed.

But.

Ye Tian was extremely looking forward to the arrival of the extradimensional storm.

05 On the other hand, the realm of God and the realm of eternity are chaotic.

Because some of the peak realm gods among the supreme forces revealed the matter of the arrival of the superdimensional storm to some high-level realm gods of the top forces, and the high-level realm gods leaked out.

This leads to the fact that the top powers are aware of it.

Although some ordinary forces do not know what is happening, they also know that disaster is coming, and if they do not take refuge in the supreme forces, they will almost certainly die.

So, there's chaos everywhere.

......

The Bounds of the Endless Seams.

Terran Temple.

Ye Xingchen came to find Ye Tian.

"Father, many top forces want to take refuge in us and enter the No. 2 Star Dimension Void Heaven Array to escape the extradimensional storm. Ye Xingchen reported.

"Don't pay attention!" Ye Tian waved his hand, "These forces didn't take refuge in the past, but now they come to take refuge, just to save their lives, and our human race doesn't need them to strengthen their power, even if we save them, we can't get their gratitude, and maybe there will be some small troubles in the future." "

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen understood.

Subsequently.

The Terrans rejected the refuge of those top forces, which made many of the Realm Gods angry and secretly scolded the Terrans.

Of course, they did not give up hope and went to other supreme forces.

It's a pity that other supreme forces don't accept these top forces either.

As for the Boundary Court Headquarters, it has now been disbanded, and the Realm Gods who belong to the supreme forces in the Boundary Court Headquarters have all gone back, otherwise they will also die.

Under the extradimensional storm, the Realm Court Headquarters will not be able to withstand it.

As the extradimensional storm approached and the chaos became more and more serious, many realm gods began to go crazy and even turned into demon seeds.

However.

The supreme forces have already activated the extra-dimensional formation, completely closing off the outside world, and ignoring all the actions of the outside world.

The same is true for the Terrans.

Ye Tian asked the peak realm gods to maintain the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array and take turns to rest.

And several of his replica bodies were also maintaining the formation, ensuring that the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array could block the extradimensional storm and reduce losses.

Another time passed, and the Void of Death began to shake.

The extradimensional storm is finally coming.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian said.

As soon as Ye Xingchen and the others heard Ye Tian's words, they knew that it was a superdimensional storm coming, and they were a little nervous.

They didn't know what the extradimensional storm looked like, everything was unknown, although the Star Dimensional Void Heavenly Array could withstand the extradimensional storm, but what the specific situation was, they still didn't know, and they were naturally a little worried in their hearts.

......

Rumble!!!!!

An extradimensional storm descends, and a terrifying storm engulfs everything.

A superdimensional treasure land was instantly shattered under the sweep of the extradimensional storm.

Each of the extradimensional creatures is comparable in strength to the powerful Peak Realm God, second only to the Liangyi Realm God.

However, under the sweep of the extradimensional storm, the bodies of these extradimensional creatures gradually shattered, and only a very small number of extradimensional creatures with strong life-saving ability survived.

Of course.

This extradimensional storm has also swept through the territory of certain terrifying extradimensional creatures.

Somewhere in the void of death.

A terrifying black serpent awoke and roared when it saw that its lair had been destroyed by an extradimensional storm.

The roar brought the surrounding storm to a halt for a moment, and then it tore through the extradimensional storm and leaped away. []

After a while, it came to the boundary extradimensional barrier, and with a flick of its tail, it directly tore through the border extradimensional barrier and left from the territory of 7362.

Obviously, it doesn't like to be in the extradimensional storm realm, and now it's about to migrate.

If there is a half-step extradimensional realm here, you know that the strength of this extradimensional creature has reached the extradimensional realm.

In addition to this extradimensional creature of the extradimensional realm, there are a few existences in the 7362nd realm that have reached the half-step extradimensional realm, and their strength is also very strong, although they cannot leave this territory, they will not be injured by the extradimensional storm.

It's just that in the extradimensional storm, the range of their perception is also very small, and they don't dare to run around, and they still live in their own territory.

Soon.

The extradimensional storm swept across the entire Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory, and the Realm God Realm, the Eternal Realm Realm, the Demon Seed Abyss, and those Realm Cracks were naturally also affected.

The realm of the gods.

Rumble!!!!

Cracks were born here and there, and the aftermath of the extradimensional storm was involved.

The extradimensional storm cannot destroy the Eternal Realm 750 and the Realm God Realm, but it can destroy the living beings within.

I saw a ray of extradimensional storm descend on an eternal realm.

In the next moment, this eternal kingdom was annihilated and turned to ashes.

Disaster!

This is a real disaster!

When a high-level pinnacle realm god saw this scene, defensive weapons appeared on his body, and various life-saving eternal realm spiritual techniques were blessed on his body.

However.

A ray of extradimensional storm descends.

"No!"

In despair, this high-level peak realm god was instantly annihilated by this extradimensional storm.

Gradually, the extradimensional storm blew through some obscure realms and destroyed these realms one after another, but there was nothing to do in the place of origin of the human race, because that realm was put away by Ye Tian, so naturally it didn't matter.

With the passage of time, most of the realms of the Eternal Realm and the Realm of the Gods collapsed and annihilated, and countless living beings fell, like a catastrophe of annihilation.

Thundered!!!!

The extradimensional storm continued to impact the Star Dimension Void Sky Array.

And Ye Tian has been urging the super-dimensional formation to resist the aftermath of the super-dimensional storm, so there is nothing to do.

"The power of the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array is very good, and I didn't cut corners, I should be able to block the aftermath of the extradimensional storm. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he prepared to let his copy body enter the extradimensional storm to find the existence of the extradimensional elf.
